name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for the atlas or data pipeline
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or planning problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why it matters

Explain the policy, planning, or contributor value.

## Scope

- Data ingestion
- Scoring
- Scenario engine
- Supply-gap mode
- Geography / timeline / pathways
- Frontend UX
- Exports
- Documentation

## Additional context

Add examples, mockups, references, or related issues.
